figures.caption: Fig. 8: Round duration overhead of FLTorrent (with unlinkability hardening) vs. BitTorrent-only for LLM-scale updates.
Fig. 2: Convergence on MNIST and CIFAR-10 under IID and Dirichlet non-IID splits (α ∈ {0.5, 0.1}). Test accuracy vs. communication rounds for CFL, GossipDFL, and FLTorrent.
